channel.title: Personal Development on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Personal Development on jamesm.blog

item.title: Learning How to Learn in the Age of AI
item.description: When an AI can answer any question instantly, the old study habits stop working. A practical guide to rebuilding your learning process so you still end up with skills, not just finished tasks.

item.title: From Awakening to Action: Building the Life You've Discovered
item.description: After the awakening comes the work: How to translate clarity about your purpose into concrete, sustainable action. The bridge between cosmic insight and real change.

item.title: The Most Valuable Skill Is Knowing What Not To Build
item.description: The skill of saying no - of recognizing which ideas deserve your time and which don't - is more valuable than execution ability.

item.title: Boosting Productivity: Essential Habits for Personal Growth
item.description: Discover actionable strategies and essential habits to significantly boost your productivity, foster continuous personal growth, and achieve your goals more effectively.

item.title: Rebuilding Your Life With Small Systems
item.description: A practical guide to rebuilding confidence, stability, and momentum through small daily systems rather than dramatic reinvention.

item.title: The Universe Has a Plan for You
item.description: Reflective essay on adversity, personal awakening, and discovering life purpose through life's challenges.

item.title: Stability in a Storm: Practical Principles for Tough Times
item.description: Practical principles and guidelines for maintaining stability and making sound decisions during challenging life periods.

item.title: Tracking Health Data
item.description: Guide to tracking personal health data including blood testing, fitness apps, smartwatches, and health monitoring tools.

item.title: 3 Things Daily Reflection Practice
item.description: Daily reflection practice with three key questions for gratitude, affirmation, and intentional living.

item.title: Phrases to Teach Your Kids
item.description: Tweet with valuable phrases and lessons to teach children for better development and resilience.

item.title: List of Personal Development Books
item.description: Recommended reading list of personal development and self-improvement books covering mental models, habits, and success.

item.title: List of Personal Development Courses
item.description: Curated collection of online courses for personal development from leading platforms including edX, Harvard, and Udemy.

item.title: List of Personal Development Videos
item.description: Curated list of YouTube channels and creators focused on personal development, motivation, and self-improvement.

item.title: Habits of Intelligent People
item.description: Tweet sharing insights on habits and behaviors common among intelligent and successful people.

item.title: Powerful Visuals About Psychology & Life
item.description: Tweet featuring visual insights about psychology, human behavior, and life lessons.
